languages.text: "Уважаемый Себериан, это Ведка Дунавски, мой архмилитант и командующая 32-м меровским полком".

traits.locale_text: "Уважаемый Себериан, это Ведка Дунавски, мой архимилитант и командующая 32-м меровским полком".

languages.text: "Esteemed Seberian, this is Vedka Dunawski, my Arch-Militant and commander of the 32nd Merov Regiment."
languages.original_text: "Уважаемый Себериан, это Ведка Дунавски, мой архмилитант и командующая 32-м меровским полком".

traits.locale_text: "Esteemed Seberian, this is Vedka Dunawski, my arch-militant and commander of the 32nd Merov Regiment."
"Esteemed Seberian, this is Vedka Dunawski, my arch-militant and commander of the 32nd Merov Regiment."
"Esteemed Seberian, this is Vedka Dunawski, my arch-militant and commander of the 32nd Merov Regiment."
"Esteemed Seberian, this is Vedka Dunawski, my arch-militant and commander of the 32nd Merov Regiment."

languages.text: "Geschätzter Seberian, das ist Vedka Dunawski, meine Erzmilitantin und Befehlshaberin des 32. Merov-Regiments.
languages.original_text: "Esteemed Seberian, this is Vedka Dunawski, my Arch-Militant and commander of the 32nd Merov Regiment."

traits.locale_text: "Geschätzter Seberian, das ist Vedka Dunawski, meine Erzmilitantin und Befehlshaberin des 32. Merov-Regiments.

languages.text: « Honorable Seberian, je vous présente Vedka Dunawski, mon archimilitante et commandante du 32e régiment de Merov. »
languages.original_text: "Esteemed Seberian, this is Vedka Dunawski, my Arch-Militant and commander of the 32nd Merov Regiment."

traits.locale_text: « Honorable Seberian, je vous présente Vedka Dunawski, mon archimilitante et commandante du 32e régiment de Merov. »

languages.text: «Estimado Seberian, esta es Vedka Dunawski, mi Archimilitante y comandante del 32.º regimiento de Merov».
languages.original_text: "Esteemed Seberian, this is Vedka Dunawski, my Arch-Militant and commander of the 32nd Merov Regiment."

traits.locale_text: «Estimado Seberian, esta es Vedka Dunawski, mi Archimilitante y comandante del 32.º regimiento de Merov».

languages.text: "Saygıdeğer Seberian, bu Vedka Dunawski. Başmilitanım ve 32. Merov Alayı'nın komutanı."
languages.original_text: "Esteemed Seberian, this is Vedka Dunawski, my Arch-Militant and commander of the 32nd Merov Regiment."

traits.locale_text: "Saygıdeğer Seberian, bu Vedka Dunawski. Başmilitanım ve 32. Merov Alayı'nın komutanı."

languages.text: “尊敬的塞贝里安，这位是薇德卡·杜纳芙斯卡，我的首席战士，梅罗夫第32团的指挥官。”
languages.original_text: "Esteemed Seberian, this is Vedka Dunawski, my Arch-Militant and commander of the 32nd Merov Regiment."

traits.locale_text: “尊敬的塞贝里安，这位是薇德卡·杜纳芙斯卡，我的首席战士，梅罗夫第32团的指挥官。”

languages.text: 「尊敬するシベリア人、これはヴェドカ・ドゥナウスキー、私の最高軍事指導者で32番目のメローフ連隊の指揮官です。」
languages.original_text: "Esteemed Seberian, this is Vedka Dunawski, my Arch-Militant and commander of the 32nd Merov Regiment."

traits.locale_text: 「尊敬するシベリア人、これはヴェドカ・ドゥナウスキー、私の最高軍事指導者で32番目のメローフ連隊の指揮官です。」
